channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google’s Gemini 2.5 Pro could be the most important AI model so far this year
item.description: Google released its new Gemini 2.5 Pro Experimental AI model late last month, and it’s quickly stacked up top marks on a number of coding, math, and reasoning benchmark tests—making it a contender for the world’s best model right now.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tariff war throws building of data centers into disarray
item.description: Enterprise IT leaders are facing a double-whammy of uncertainties complicating their data center building decisions: The ever-changing realities of genAI strategies, and the back-and-forth nature of the current tariff wars pushed by the United States. “This is obviously a fluid situation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft urges Office users to upgrade to 365
item.description: Microsoft is urging Office 2016 and 2019 customers to upgrade to Microsoft 365 before support ends Oct. 14, but analysts said viable alternatives are available outside Microsoft’s walled garden.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: ServiceNow Acquires Logik.ai to Expand CRM Capabilities
item.description: ServiceNow acquires Logik.ai, a configure, price, quote (CPQ) solution, to expand its customer relationship management (CRM) product portfolio and accelerate momentum in sales and order management.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How To Accelerate Digital Transformation
item.description: Your weekly round-up of the questions asked by readers of CIO, Computerworld, CSO, InfoWorld, and Network World sees us learn how culture impacts digital transformation, the rise of cloud-based ERP, and desktop-based office software.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple patents motion-predicting technology that can count reps and identify exercises during a workout
item.description: A new Apple patent reveals technology that can identify exercises and count reps during workouts using a camera.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Accelerate cloud infrastructure initiatives with Lucid Software
item.description: Cloud and development operations (devops) teams are under constant pressure to do more, faster. They have outdated systems to update and manage, new systems to build, and requests from business units who need their support. It’s a velocity problem, and IT departments often struggle to keep pace.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The Future of Agile: Scaling Practices with Lucid Software's Accelerator
item.description: Discover how Lucid Software's Agile Accelerator helps organizations scale Agile practices, improve team performance, and increase visibility for teams and leaders.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Exploring the confluence of tech and sustainability for a better future
item.description: Sustainability efforts are gathering steam on a global scale, with governments and organizations levying their might behind measures to formulate and implement policies that can stop or even reverse global environmental damage and create positive impact for local communities.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Opinion: The tech fantasy that powers AI is running on fumes
item.description: We were promised life-changing transformations. Instead we get a mid-level technology that helps us write emails.
item.dc:creator: Tressie McMillan Cottom, The Mercury News

item.title: Adobe Premiere Pro updates bring some serious AI power
item.description: Adobe is leveraging AI in version 25.2 of Premiere Pro for Generative Extend, auto caption translation and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: United receives FAA certification on Starlink-equipped aircraft
item.description: United has received FAA approval for a Starlink-equipped plane. The first commercial flight is set for May.
item.dc:creator: Diana Falzone, The Hill

item.title: The Tumblr revival is real—and Gen Z is leading the charge
item.description: Rumors of a Tumblr comeback have been bubbling for a couple of years—think a pair of Doc Martens here, a splash of pastel hair dye there. Now, Gen Z is embracing the platform as a refuge from an internet saturated with influencers and algorithm fatigue.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Proton VPN unveils a major revamp to its Windows, iOS, and Android apps
item.description: Proton VPN has just released new updates and features for its Windows, iOS, and Android apps. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Humanoid robot stuns with perfect side-flip acrobatics
item.description: Unitree, a Chinese robotics company that developed a backflipping robot, has now introduced a humanoid robot capable of doing a side flip.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 7 common transformation mistakes and how to avoid them
item.description: In Italy alone, over 60% of large companies hinge their strategies for success on digitalization, indicating a lack of awareness and perspective of what digital transformation actually means.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New MLCommons benchmarks to test AI infrastructure performance
item.description: Industry consortium MLCommons has released new versions of its MLPerf Inference benchmarks, offering a closer look at how current-generation data center and edge hardware performs under increasingly demanding AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: CIO legend Andi Karaboutis on what every IT leader should master
item.description: The career journey of CIO Hall of Fame legend Adriana (Andi) Karaboutis spans multiple industries, geographies, and transformational moments.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: GenAI is already transforming the healthcare industry
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) is quickly transforming healthcare, according to a survey by consultancy McKinsey & Co. released today. The survey of 150 healthcare industry organizations found 85% are exploring or had already adopted genAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: NASA's Webb telescope captures photos of the asteroid that won't hit Earth in 2032
item.description: NASA's Webb telescope has captured pictures of the asteroid that caused a stir earlier this year when it topped Earth's hit list.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: CMMC review, multiuse SCIFs on radar of DoD acquisition nominee
item.description: Michael Duffey, the nominee to be USD for acquisition and sustainment, told lawmakers he's sensitive to CMMC compliance challenges for small businesses. The post CMMC review, multiuse SCIFs on radar of DoD acquisition nominee first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
